name: Garlic Butter Baked Cod
description: Tender cod fillets baked under a simple garlic-butter-parsley paste with lemon — fast, mild, and kid-friendly. Works great with frozen cod.
recipeIngredient: 1 pound cod (4 fillets, about 4 ounces each)
2 tablespoons fresh parsley, finely chopped (or 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. If using frozen cod, thaw in a sealed bag under cold water for 10-15 minutes, then pat dry.
In a small bowl, combine the butter, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and parsley. Stir into a fairly smooth paste.
Place the cod fillets in a baking dish. Spread the garlic-butter mixture evenly over each fillet.
Slice half the lemon and lay the slices on top of the fish; cut the other half into wedges for serving.
Bake 15-20 minutes, until the fish flakes easily and reaches 145°F internal (thicker fillets or ceramic dishes may take longer).
Spoon the pan juices over the fish and serve immediately with lemon wedges.
